query:
-- Update services.customerExternalId for TIAB SIM services via tiab_services → tiab_customers chain
UPDATE services s
JOIN tiab_services ts ON s.externalId = ts.internalServiceExternalId
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
SET s.customerExternalId = tc.internalCustomerExternalId,
    s.customerName = (SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.externalId = tc.internalCustomerExternalId)
WHERE tc.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND tc.matchType NOT IN ('internal_test', 'internal_orphan');

-- Check how many were updated
SELECT COUNT(*) as updated_tiab_services
FROM services s
JOIN tiab_services ts ON s.externalId = ts.internalServiceExternalId
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
WHERE tc.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND tc.matchType NOT IN ('internal_test', 'internal_orphan');

-- Check how many were updated
SELECT COUNT(*) as updated_tiab_services
FROM services s
JOIN tiab_services ts ON s.externalId = ts.internalServiceExternalId
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
